title: FairDura
description: Allows you to see armor durability by both item and model textures.
body:
# FairDura by iFair_
 This pack requires [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) due to Vanilla limitations.
 You can still use the pack without it, but you'll only be able to see the item textures

## Textures
Textures change every 5% of durability lost. Transitions start from dark blue (95%) and turns red (5%) right before breaking. You can estimate the remaining durability by looking at the colour and lightness.
### Item
![Colours of the netherite helmet change depending on its durability.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4367c2e563e5ea72f195eed42c20160db7b9b66.gif)
### Models
![Colours of the netherite armor sets change depending on their durability.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/972017c52d5f58c194434f456397d3d92cd2fdca.png)

# Lastly
I'll update this pack later. If you have any feedback or question, just dm me on discord.
**Discord:** ifair_
